title: Exchange rates
description: Practice what you know about exchange rates in this exercise.
topic_path: Open economy: international trade and finance

assessment_items.question_content:
Leah is a Canadian citizen who wants to go to  Russia. She will need to trade in her Canadian dollars for Russian rubles.

**Which of the following is the correct way to express the exchange rate of a Canadian dollar?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: $40$ Rubles per $\$1$ CAD
$\$1$ CAD\$ per $40$ rubles
ER

assessment_items.question_content:
The currency of Ghana is the cedi and the currency of Aruba is the florin.

**Which of the following best defines the exchange rate for the Aruban florin?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: the quantity of cedi per florin
the quantity of florin per cedi
the quantity of cedi needed
the quantity of florin needed to exchange for goods
the number of cedi needed to exchange for goods

assessment_items.question_content:
The exchange rates for three currencies are given in the table below. 


Currency being exchanged |  Cost of currency being exchanged in Thai baht (THB) | Cost of currency being exchanged in Danish krone (DKK) | Cost of currency being exchanged in Ghana cedi (GHS)
-|-|-|-
Thai baht (THB) | $1$ | $0.2$ | $0.125$
Danish krone (DKK) |$5$ |$1$|$0.625$
Ghana cedi (GHS) |$8$|$1.6$|$1$

**Which of the following is an exchange rate for the baht?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: $0.125$ cedi per baht
$8$ baht per cedi
$5$ baht per krone
$0.2$ baht per krone

assessment_items.question_content:
The exchange rates for three currencies are given in the table below. Note that the one of the exchange rates for the cedi is missing.


Currency being exchanged |  Cost of currency being exchanged in Thai baht (THB) | Cost of currency being exchanged in Danish krone (DKK) | Cost of currency being exchanged in Ghana cedi (GHS)
-|-|-|-
Thai baht (THB) |$1$|$0.2$|$0.125$
Danish krone (DKK) |$5$|$1$|$0.625$
Ghana cedi (GHS) |____|$1.6$|$1$

**If exchange rates are freely floating, what is the missing exchange rate for the cedi?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: $8$ baht per cedi
$0.125$ cedi per baht
$\dfrac{1}{2}$ baht per cedi
$8$ cedi per baht
$0.125$ baht per cedi

assessment_items.question_content:
The exchange rates for three currencies are given in the table below. 

Currency being exchanged |  Cost of currency being exchanged in Thai baht (THB) | Cost of currency being exchanged in Danish krone (DKK) | Cost of currency being exchanged in Ghana cedi (GHS)
-|-|-|-
Thai baht (THB) |$1$ |$0.2$ |$0.125$
Danish krone (DKK) |$5$ |$1$|$0.625$
Ghana cedi (GHS) |$8$|$1.6$|$1$


**Which of the following is a correct exchange rate for the krone?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: $5$ baht per krone
$0.2$ krone per baht
$1.6$ cedis per krone
$5$ krone per baht

assessment_items.question_content:
Flora is traveling from Argentina to Russia. The currency of Argentina is the peso, the currency of Russia is the ruble, and the exchange rate is $1$ peso equals $2$ rubles.

**Which of the following can be concluded based on this exchange rate?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The exchange rate of the ruble is $0.5$ pesos per ruble.
The ruble has appreciated.
The ruble has depreciated.
The exchange rate of the peso is $1$ peso per $2$ rubles.
A ruble buys twice as many goods as a peso.

assessment_items.question_content:
Flora is traveling to Russia from Argentina. The currency of Argentina is the peso, and the currency of Russia is the ruble.

**If Flora hears that the peso has appreciated, which of the following best describes the impact the appreciation has on her trip?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Her purchasing power has increased.
Her purchasing power has decreased.
The value of the peso and the ruble are now equal to each other.
The number of pesos it takes to buy a ruble is higher than the number of rubles it takes to buy a peso.
The number of pesos it takes to buy a ruble is smaller than the number of rubles it takes to buy a peso.

assessment_items.question_content:
Bill is traveling to Russia from New Zealand . The currency of New Zealand is the dollar, and the currency of Russia is the ruble.

**If Bill hears that the New Zealand dollar has depreciated against the Russian ruble, which of the following best describes the impact the depreciation has on his trip?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: His purchasing power has decreased.
His purchasing power has increased.
The value of the dollar and the ruble are now equal to each other.
The number of dollars it takes to buy a ruble is higher than the number of rubles it takes to buy a dollar.
The number of dollars it takes to buy a ruble is smaller than the number of rubles it takes to buy a dollar.

assessment_items.question_content:
The concepts of currency appreciation and depreciation are crucial for understanding fluctuations in exchange rates.

**Which of the following best describes a depreciated currency?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It takes less of another currency to buy that currency.
It takes more of another currency to buy that currency.
The depreciated currency can buy fewer domestic goods and services.
The depreciated currency can buy more domestic goods and services.
The value of two currencies has equalized.

assessment_items.question_content:
The concepts of currency appreciation and depreciation are crucial for understanding fluctuations in exchange rates.

**Which of the following best describes an appreciated currency?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It takes more of another currency to buy that currency.
It takes less of another currency to buy that currency.
The depreciated currency can buy fewer domestic goods and services.
The depreciated currency can buy more domestic goods and services.
The value of two currencies has equalized.

assessment_items.question_content:
Suppose the Russian ruble appreciated between May and June 2018. 

**What would this have meant for tourists heading to Russia to watch the World Cup in June 2018?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It would have taken more of their currency to buy the ruble.
The exchange rate of other currencies relative to the ruble would have increased.
Russia’s price level would have increased.
The exchange rate of the ruble would have decreased.
Russian goods would have been relatively cheaper to tourists.

assessment_items.question_content:
The international quidditch tournament is being held in Ghana. The currency of Ghana is the cedi.

**If the cedi has depreciated, what does that mean for tourists heading to Ghana to watch the tournament?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It will take less of their currency to buy the cedi.
The exchange rate of other currencies relative to the cedi has decreased.
Ghana’s price level has decreased.
The exchange rate of the cedi has increased.
Ghanian goods will be relatively more expensive to tourists.
